titleStmt.title: SII 24.31: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 31. (A.R. No. 131 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land by the temple executives to Poṉṉambalakkūttaṉ alias Kāliṅgarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻn=ta puṇariyakaḻ cūḻn=tapuviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vaiyrākarattu vāriyayir muṉaik kontaḷava racar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḻvali kāṭṭi porarpari naṭāttik kīrttiyai nirutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum ṭiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyāka
tonnila ven=tar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkoḷ ticaitoṟum cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam veṅkaṉum tantu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutanimeruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟi vāntarattu pūpālar tiṟai viṭutanta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa viḷaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭa tan ponnakarp puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vin nāḷ piṟkula piṟai pol niṟpiḻaiyennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena tuṅka pattiraiyaḷavu veṅkaṇum
paṭṭa veṅkaḷuru viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina vīramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malai kaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭal kaḷum (talai) talai virittala ttannāḷukantu tānun tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapala mutuku payantetirmāṟi jayap peruntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭu Īṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅ tantiravāriyum tantiravāriyum Uṭai
ttāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñ ceṉaiyai yevip pañcavaraiyvarum poruta porkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇena pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vañcuratiriyum poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vijayastampam ticai toṟum niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiḻp potiyalu mattaveṅkari paṭumaiyyaccayamum kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellāna tani vicum peṟa (ṟi) māveṟiya ḷpaṭa neṟito tiṟaikoḷ vīrasiṅhāsana
m viṭṭaruḷi poṅkoḷiyāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola vīramum tiyākamum viḷaṅka pār koḷ civaniṭattumaiyena Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷu ṭaṉ kaṅkai vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya maṅkaiyar tilatam Eḻicai vallapi Eḻulaka muṭaiyāḷiruppa yum Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu Āvatu rājamahentra vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār koyilil śrī kāriyañ kanmika ya ceykiṟa nālūr tirunāḷuṭai
yā nampiyum tiruveṅkaṭappiccarum Olikonṟai śrī viṣṇu nampiyum yum śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkanum pāratāyan cirā man Ārāvamutum pāratāyan mātavan Aṟivariyānum kāciyapan taniyi ḷañciṅka[ mum sabhai] kkaṇakku nānūṟṟuvap piriyanum śrī vayiṣṇavap piriya num Uḷḷiṭṭa kanmikaḷom jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu perumpākkiḻaiyān Āna mārāyan ponnampala yaṟku nāṅkaḷ
kattāḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāna kāraikkuṭiyil 5ndha kāvatu maṇaliṭāyk kiṭan=ta nilattukku Icainta kiḻpārk kellai viḷattūr nāṭṭu vāykkālukku meṟkum llai karikālacaruppetimaṅkalattu viḷai nilattukku vaṭakku ṟkellai meṟpaṭiyūr veṭṭippeṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟpaṭi vāy kkālukkut teṟkum Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa ten kopurattu kīḻ kai (1/2)nya Arai yemummā Innī tiruttaṟatirutti muṟṟūṭṭuṇṭu Āḻvār śrī paṇṭārattu ve
ṇṭāratte Aḷakkak kaṭavarākavum Innilattukku nilavilaiyā kku Oṭukkina kācuki ṟām mukkā m śrī paṇṭārattu Oṭukki Innilam tiruttaṟat ti niyāya paripā runan=ta vānam ceykiṟa śrī karadāsan Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḷ Iraṇ ṭukku nāḷ 1- kku nitta ḷa mmā4 Āka Āḷ 2kku ḷa nya Āka Āṇṭuvarai ḷa nūṟṟukkalamum lattile Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu In
ppaṭi tiruvāytalil pon=takuṭimai ceyyak kaṭavarā nilam (1/2)nya Araiye munṟu mā vaṟ kāla mārittiru nattukku kol viḻu munṟumāc ce �riviḷākam Āvatākavum nikki (1/2) Araiyum niyāyapparipā viḷākamāvatākavum Āka nilam Arai yemunṟumāvum niyāya paripā vaṟkālamākat tiru śrī kulacekaradāsanum vaṟkattā
m jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu maṇaiyil koṭṭattu mā yal Arum rānāna n ponnam palak kūttanāna kāliṅkarāya Āḻvārkanmi kaḷom Ivai koyil kaṇakku ppiriyanen Ārāvamu puṇṭarīkane Ippaṭikkivai Iliko vayiṣṇanampi Eḻuttu pāratāyan kecu van
yiṣṇavappiriyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruveṅkaṭappiriyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvaraṅkattamutaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Itu śrī vayiṣṇavarakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 24.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
